=== REMY FORWARDER SERVICE FILE ===
[Unit]
Description=Remy Telegram Webhook Forwarder (0.0.0.0:8788 -> 127.0.0.1:8787)
After=network.target openclaw-gateway.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=jose
ExecStart=/usr/bin/socat TCP-LISTEN:8788,fork,reuseaddr TCP:127.0.0.1:9119
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

=== WHAT IS ON PORT 8787? ===
LISTEN 0      511        127.0.0.1:8787      0.0.0.0:*    users:(("openclaw",pid=17862,fd=26))
unauthorized
=== TELEGRAM WEBHOOK NGINX ROUTE ===
    location /telegram-webhook {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8787;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;

=== OPENCLAW TELEGRAM WEBHOOK PATH ===
2026-06-12T03:15:57-04:00 vm-openclaw socat[17862]: 2026/06/12 03:15:57 socat[17862] E bind(5, {AF=2 0.0.0.0:8788}, 16): Address already in use
